message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Digital Public Goods Backlog\nBasic architecture

actor User as U
participant "backlog.dpg.net" as B
participant "api.backlog.dpg.net" as A
database Database as D

U -> B : HTTP GET /projects
B -> A : HTTP GET /projects
A -> D : Query the projects table
D --> A : Return the results
A --> B : JSON response
B --> U : HTML response

@enduml
```
